user_query: On fathers third day, add a superfood breakfast

fields.name: Superfood Quinoa & Berry Breakfast Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense warm bowl featuring protein-rich quinoa, antioxidant-packed berries, and crunchy superfood toppings.
fields.meal_suggestion: Cook quinoa in almond milk with a pinch of cinnamon until fluffy. Top with fresh blueberries, goji berries, a tablespoon of hemp hearts, and a dollop of almond butter. Drizzle with a teaspoon of raw honey if desired.
fields.nutrition_note: Quinoa is a complete plant-based protein; blueberries and goji berries provide high levels of antioxidants; hemp hearts offer essential omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids. This bowl is designed for sustained energy and cognitive support.

insertion_point.reasoning: Position -1 appends the new superfood option to the end of the existing breakfast list for Day 3. This adds a high-nutrient density alternative to the existing fruit plate, oats, and pancakes.
